projectDescription: A self-hosted local media browser for managing, searching, and playing video, image, and audio files, built with Next.js and a PHP/MySQL backend.
keyFeatures: Media grid browser for images, videos, and audio files
Real-time search across titles, descriptions, and categories
Automatic video thumbnail extraction via FFmpeg
Category-based filtering with hierarchical category signatures
Watch history tracking (last 50 items) in localStorage
Database statistics dashboard (total media, storage usage, media by type)
Deployment scripts for Windows (PowerShell) and Linux/macOS (Bash)
publicApiSurface: MediaItem { id, title, description, type, signature, url, thumbnail, duration, uploadDate }
StatsData { total_media, total_size_mb, avg_size_kb, by_type, latest_upload }
